_comment: DEV / tuning corpus for lexicon evaluation. `expected` = what a human teacher would intend, NOT what the engine currently produces — so a <100% score is expected and shows where to grow. methods list keys (with optional negated). You MAY tune the lexicon against these. The CI quality gate uses the HELD-OUT gold_corpus_test.json instead. Grow this toward 150-300 notes from real observations + lexicon_misses. Run: npm run lexicon:eval

notes.raw: Emma sounded out the CVC word using picture cards
Noah blended the sounds independently and got them all correct
Aisha read out loud to the class with expression
Liam identified rhyming words during our song
Emma wrote her name neatly on the paper
Marcus reversed his b and d again in his handwriting
Aisha recognized 5 sight words on the flash cards
Noah retold the story in the right order

Liam named all the uppercase letters
Emma counted to 20 with one to one correspondence
Aisha used ten frames to subitize the dots

Liam compared which tower was taller
Emma extended the AB pattern correctly
Diego took away 3 and knew how many were left
Aisha recognized the numeral 7

Aisha followed the two step direction

the teacher broke the task into smaller steps for Liam

we did a number talk about making ten
